response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates 10+ years of fullstack experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js background, direct experience with React, and contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP). Her work spans high-throughput systems (Optilyz), Kubernetes deployments (GISCollective), and diverse stacks, aligning well with the role's requirements. However, Kotlin/Java experience is limited to select projects, and frontend depth (e.g., Vitest) is not explicitly highlighted.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript and Node.js
Proven track record in scaling systems (e.g., millions of mails at Optilyz)
Direct experience with AI agent tooling and MCP infrastructure
concerns: Limited explicit Kotlin/Java experience for backend services
Frontend testing focus (Vitest) not prominently mentioned in resume
Recent role (re:cinq) is very brief (since April 2025)
